note: 27 Warrior/Legend algos in 3×9 grid + Jedi master. Tier D = Alpha Library (TRADER/EDGE types). status: ACTIVE|RESERVE|CANDIDATE. regime_sharpe filled as study matures.

jedi.label: JEDI MASTER
jedi.desc: Daily/Weekly/Quarterly Bias · Liquidity Draw · Structure Gate

algorithms.name: NIALL SPIKE
algorithms.method: Ask-delta σ spike on 1m/5m. Institutional absorption.

algorithms.name: CYBER-ICT
algorithms.method: Auto-detect OB/FVG/Breaker on 15m+1H. Return entry.

algorithms.name: BANSHEE SQUEEZE
algorithms.method: BB inside KC = squeeze. First expansion bar fires.

algorithms.name: CELTIC CROSS
algorithms.method: 8/21/34/55/89 full bullish stack. Partial = fractional.

algorithms.name: WOLFHOUND
algorithms.method: 3 consecutive accel bars + expanding range.

algorithms.name: STONE ANCHOR
algorithms.method: VPOC slope + HVN/LVN proximity scoring.

algorithms.name: HIGH KING
algorithms.method: ORB 5/30min. PDH/PDL macro filter.

algorithms.name: GALLOWGLASS OB
algorithms.method: 3× vol displacement. 50% OB retrace entry.

algorithms.name: EMERALD FLOW
algorithms.method: MFI(14) cross 50. Divergence = reversal flag.

algorithms.name: 8-EMA RIBBON
algorithms.method: Price vs 8EMA. Ribbon width = momentum score 0-10.

algorithms.name: VEGA TRAP
algorithms.method: Max pain, gamma walls, dealer hedging flow.

algorithms.name: MARKET SHIFT
algorithms.method: Structure change on 15m/1H with volume confirm.

algorithms.name: DARK POOL
algorithms.method: DP ratio anomaly >2× avg at key technical levels.

algorithms.name: WYCKOFF SPRING
algorithms.method: SC/AR/ST/Spring/LPS/LPSY phase confidence scoring.

algorithms.name: RENKO VAULT
algorithms.method: 1×ATR bricks. 3 consecutive bullish = long signal.

algorithms.name: HARMONIC LENS
algorithms.method: PRZ completion ±0.5% + RSI divergence confirm.

algorithms.name: ALPHA IMBALANCE
algorithms.method: FVG catalog by age+proximity+vol. 70th pct threshold.

algorithms.name: VOLKOV KELTNER
algorithms.method: KC breakout with vol surge. ATR trail management.

algorithms.name: STOCKBEE EP
algorithms.method: Gap-up 3×avg vol + catalyst. 20-30% target 1-3M.

algorithms.name: ICT WEEKLY FVG
algorithms.method: Weekly virgin FVG never touched. Monthly draw align.

algorithms.name: WEINSTEIN STAGE
algorithms.method: 6-month base + vol expansion above 30W MA.

algorithms.name: CASPER IFVG
algorithms.method: Quarterly IFVG as price target. Void depth scoring.

algorithms.name: TTRADES FRACTAL
algorithms.method: HH/HL daily+weekly+monthly alignment. Fib targets.

algorithms.name: RAYNER TREND
algorithms.method: 200MA up-slope + 50EMA pullback. Min 1:3 RR.

algorithms.name: MINERVINI VCP
algorithms.method: Progressive tighter bases 33% each. Pivot breakout.

algorithms.name: O'NEIL BREAKOUT
algorithms.method: EPS accel + RS>80 + 40% vol pivot breakout.

algorithms.name: DRAGONFLY VOL
algorithms.method: RS line 52W high + institutional sector accumulation.

algorithms.name: MARCO TRADES
algorithms.method: Price breaks HTF High/Low to grab liquidity → rejects. Enter on structure shift after sweep.
algorithms.notes: Chart Fanatics. Core concept: retail S/R becomes inducement. Study killzone timing.

algorithms.name: MENTFX
algorithms.method: Identify CHoCH on LTF after HTF OB mitigation. Discount zone entry (below 50% Fib).
algorithms.notes: Market structure / OB focus. Complements MS algo. Study mitigation depth.

algorithms.name: JUSTIN WERLEIN
algorithms.method: Kill script if loss >0.5% account in session. Position sizing by conviction tier.
algorithms.notes: Risk management edge, not signal. Integrate into TradeBot kill-switch logic.

algorithms.name: PHANTOM STRATEGY
algorithms.method: Fresh S/D zones from strong base-rally/drop-base moves. No revisit = valid.
algorithms.notes: Classic S/D. Compare zone quality vs ICT OB — when do they differ?

algorithms.name: ALI KHAN
algorithms.method: Volume spike at key level + PA rejection candle. Context: HTF bias required.
algorithms.notes: Volume confirmation layer. Potential EDGE: vol spike at liquidity sweep.

algorithms.name: CUE BANKS
algorithms.method: Sentiment shift detection: retail capitulation + fundamental catalyst alignment.
algorithms.notes: Macro/sentiment overlay. Relevant for FOMC_FLAT regime gating.

algorithms.name: BOOKMAP ABSORPTION
algorithms.method: Large passive bid absorbs aggressive selling at HTF support. Footprint/heatmap confirm.
algorithms.notes: Requires Bookmap feed. First edge to test once data source is wired.
